summary: Phase 4 backend + frontend tested. Backend: 24/24 pytest pass (VehicleEntry create/update, paired CSV import Matrícula N/Modelo N, bulk 200-row insert, admin update_user with seed/self guards, admin delete regression, mailing /admin/mailing/emails admin-only with dedup+lowercase+@-filter, retrocompat legacy data normalized). Frontend: Mailing page works (214 emails total, copy/csv download/filter), AllClients shows Vehículos column + pdf-client buttons, Usuarios admin edit-user save flow works with disabled state on seed users, no pageerrors. Fixed one CRITICAL backend bug: GET /api/clients returned 500 for legacy clients whose matriculas were list-of-strings (Pydantic ResponseValidationError); _normalize_client now coerces strings to {matricula, modelo:legacy_global_modelo}.

minor.issue: BEFORE FIX: legacy docs with matriculas=['STRING'] caused 500 via Pydantic ResponseValidationError (List[VehicleEntry] required dict). Applied fix in _normalize_client to coerce strings → {matricula, modelo:doc.modelo||''}. Now passes.

issues: Base form fields use data-testid='field-{key}' WITHOUT '-input' suffix while matricula/modelo pair uses '-input' suffix ('field-matricula-input', 'field-modelo-input'). Naming is inconsistent (cosmetic only — works, but confusing for tests).

action_items: Optional: align field testid naming in NewClient.jsx — either drop '-input' from matricula/modelo OR add '-input' to base fields for consistency.
Optional: gate /api/clients/import behind admin (currently any authenticated user can import). Not a blocker.
Optional: migrate FastAPI on_event('startup') to lifespan handler (deprecation, prior iteration note).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _normalize_client BEFORE fix: only handled missing matriculas, leaving legacy list-of-strings unchanged → 500 ResponseValidationError on GET /api/clients. Fixed in this iteration; uses legacy global 'modelo' as fallback for empty modelo.
server.py admin_update_user: SEED users can have their name edited but not email/role — confirmed correct per spec.

import_clients header detection uses regex r'(matricula|matrícula|modelo|...)\s*[_\-#]?\s*(\d*)\s*$' which correctly parses 'Matrícula 1','Modelo 1','Matrícula 2','Modelo 2' and pairs by index. Verified with bulk 200-row CSV in <30s using insert_many.
Mailing endpoint dedups by lowercase email, filters out blanks and non-'@' values — verified in test_mailing_emails_admin_ok.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_crm_api.py (rewritten for Iteration 4: VehicleEntry shape, paired CSV import, bulk 200 rows, admin update_user with all guards, mailing endpoint, seed restore sanity)

success_rate.frontend: ≈90% — login, nav-mailing gating for admin, AllClients (Vehículos column + pdf-client-{id} buttons present), Mailing page (emails-total=214, copy-emails-comma, copy-emails-newline, download-emails-csv yields emails_clientes_fabian_arenas.csv, mailing-filter), Usuarios admin (22 edit/delete buttons, disabled state on seed users + self, edit-user-name save flow returns 'Usuario actualizado' toast). Not directly clicked: post-create-block PDF (form-submit selectors mismatched my testids initially); however backend create-client + structure validated, and the post-create-block + jsPDF code path is intact. 0 pageerrors captured throughout.

test_credentials: marketing@fabianarenas.es / marketing442 (admin); info@fabianarenas.es / infofabianarenas442; lidiafernandez@fabianarenas.es / lidiafernandez; taller@fabianarenas.es / tallerfabianarenas442 — all 4 seed logins re-verified 200 at end of run. Lidia's display name restored to 'Lidia Fernández' after UI edit test.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created ~210 TEST_* clients (10 paired + 200 bulk) and several TEST_* users (ephemeral, some deleted). Approx 214 total client emails now in mailing endpoint (verified UI count). Non-destructive to seed users/passwords.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run with: `export $(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env) && pytest /app/backend/tests/test_crm_api.py -v`. Routes: /login, /nuevos-clientes, /todos-clientes, /fidelizacion, /mailing, /usuarios, /perfil. New testids confirmed live in DOM: field-matricula-input, field-modelo-input, field-matricula-add (NewClient); pdf-client-{id} (AllClients table); emails-total, copy-emails-comma, copy-emails-newline, download-emails-csv, mailing-filter (Mailing); edit-user-{id}, delete-user-{id}, edit-user-name, save-edit-user (UsersAdmin); nav-mailing (sidebar). Base NewClient fields use 'field-{key}' (NO '-input' suffix) — be aware. post-create-block + download-fidelity-pdf + print-fidelity-pdf exist in code but were not exercised end-to-end via Playwright due to selector mismatch on base fields; suggest main agent self-test by clicking through NewClient form manually or fixing data-testid naming.
rca of the issue: Bug: GET /api/clients returned HTTP 500 (FastAPI ResponseValidationError) for any payload containing legacy clients whose 'matriculas' field is a list of strings (from prior iterations) rather than List[{matricula, modelo}]. Root cause: response_model=List[Client] uses VehicleEntry which requires dict; the helper _normalize_client only handled missing/None matriculas, not the list-of-strings shape. Reproduction: legacy doc with matriculas=['0312LST'] → 'model_attributes_type' error 'Input should be a valid dictionary or object to extract fields from' (confirmed in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log). Mitigation applied in /app/backend/server.py _normalize_client: iterate matriculas; for each string item, coerce to {matricula: item.upper(), modelo: doc.get('modelo','')}; for each dict, preserve. Verified: test_list_clients_returns_new_structure + GET /api/clients now 200. Iteration-4 spec retrocompat assertion (matriculas=['9999AAA'] → [{matricula:'9999AAA',modelo:client.modelo||''}]) is now correctly enforced.
